title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan co-founded Corgi, an insurance technology company that rebuilt the trillion-dollar insurance industry from first principles by questioning legacy assumptions rather than incrementally modernizing incumbents. The company raised $108M Series A and is projected to hit several hundred million ARR, demonstrating that outsider perspective combined with relentless execution creates defensible moats in legacy industries.
